name: dev-flow
description: Development workflow skills with git and jj VCS support, plus beads + ADR integration (originally derived from obra/superpowers v5.0.7, now evolved independently)

interface.shortDescription: Development workflow skills with git and jj support, plus beads + ADR integration.
interface.longDescription: Codex wrapper for the dev-flow plugin (originally derived from obra/superpowers v5.0.7; evolved independently with first-class jj support, bead-based execution tracking, ADR capture, and adversarial in-session review gates). Reuses the existing workflow skills and keeps agent, hook, command, and reference files available for Codex-compatible execution paths.
defaultPrompt: Create a design and implementation plan for this change.
Debug this failure systematically and add a regression test.
Help me finish this branch with verification.
